name: Oreo Ice Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 13x9 inch glass pan.
2. Layer approximately half of the double-stuffed Oreos at the bottom of the pan.
3. Spread softened vanilla ice cream evenly over the cookies.
4. Drizzle with Hershey's chocolate sauce.
5. Add a layer of Cool Whip.
6. Drizzle additional chocolate sauce on top.
7. Cover and freeze for several hours, or until ready to serve.
8. Remove from freezer a few minutes before serving.
